theme.description: A refined, tactile, and clear dashboard emphasizing an iOS-inspired blend of Neumorphism for depth and Glassmorphism for contextual overlays. Heavy use of rounded corners, generous spacing, and crystal-clear hierarchy.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-white rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-[0_8px_16px_rgba(0,122,255,0.3)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0 active:scale-95
buttons.neumorphic: bg-[#F2F2F7] text-text-primary rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200 shadow-[6px_6px_12px_#d1d1d6,-6px_-6px_12px_#ffffff] hover:shadow-[8px_8px_16px_#d1d1d6,-8px_-8px_16px_#ffffff] active:shadow-[inset_4px_4px_8px_#d1d1d6,inset_-4px_-4px_8px_#ffffff]

cards.neumorphic_widget: bg-[#F2F2F7] rounded-3xl p-6 sm:p-8 shadow-[6px_6px_12px_#d1d1d6,-6px_-6px_12px_#ffffff] border border-white/50
cards.glass_panel: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-2xl rounded-3xl p-6 sm:p-8 border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]

inputs.neumorphic_field: bg-[#F2F2F7] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-text-primary shadow-[inset_4px_4px_8px_#d1d1d6,inset_-4px_-4px_8px_#ffffff] border-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-primary/50 transition-all placeholder:text-text-tertiary

progress_bar.fill: h-full rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-primary to-status-info shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,122,255,0.4)]

badges.glass: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/60 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium text-text-primary shadow-sm

images.description: Abstract iOS 18 style soft gradient 3D background with pale blue, lavender, and pristine white colors.
images.usage: Use this image as a subtle, fixed, screen-covering background behind the glassmorphic container/cards to create depth and visual interest, making the frosted glass effect 'pop'. Ensure it covers the full viewport (object-cover, fixed, -z-10).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML+Tailwind for custom Neumorphic components rather than fighting standard Shadcn cards. Shadcn is fine for functional parts like Select/Dialog.
The body must have a fixed background using the provided ios_abstract_bg image. This allows the Glassmorphic panels to have something beautiful to blur.
Dashboard layout: A 12-column or 4-column Control Room grid. Top widgets should be Glassmorphic or Neumorphic cards spanning 1 column each.
Active sessions panel should list jobs with thumbnails. Use the progress_bar styles provided for the watch progress.
Implement real-time WebSocket state using mock/frontend-simulated updates if backend isn't available, or connect to the actual backend.
For IPv6 badges, use the `badges.glass` style to keep the layout feeling premium and uncluttered.
Use Phosphor Icons (Weight: Duotone or Regular) for a high-end iOS aesthetic.
DO NOT use raw `#000000` or `#FFFFFF` everywhere for surfaces. Rely on the Neumorphic `#F2F2F7` and the shadow classes to construct depth.
Include an Educational Disclaimer modal or banner on first load using the Glassmorphic style.
Use custom values in tailwind.config.js to add the specific drop-shadows and box-shadows.
